data.title: Crypto Advisor Allocations Hit 32% in 2025 as Access Widens and ETF Demand Grows: Survey
data.description:
Crypto allocations by financial advisors climbed to a record 32% in 2025, up from 22% a year earlier, as Bitcoin hit new highs and US rules moved closer to the mainstream.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-advisor-allocations-hit-32-pct-up-22-pct-bitwise-vettafi-survey/

data.title: German DZ Bank Secures MiCAR License for Crypto Trading, Joins Qivalis Stablecoin Initiative

data.title: Ethereum's Prospects Improve Amid Institutional Demand and Market Dominance
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Standard Chartered Bank has released a research report indicating an improved outlook for Ethereum, suggesting it may outperform Bitcoin. Despite Bitcoin's weak performance affecting the broader cryptocurrency market, Ethereum's growing institutional demand and its dominance in stablecoins, physical assets, and decentralized finance (DeFi) support a stronger outlook. Enhanced network throughput and potential clarity in U.S. regulatory policies could further boost Ethereum's price.

The bank forecasts Ethereum's price to reach $7,500 this year, down from a previous estimate of $12,000. For 2027 and 2028, the prices are projected at $15,000 and $22,000, respectively, both lower than earlier expectations. In contrast, Standard Chartered has raised its long-term outlook, increasing the forecast for the end of 2029 to $30,000 and setting a new target of $40,000 by the end of 2030.

data.description: According to an official announcement, Bithumb will launch on the USDE Korean Won market.

data.title: DASH surged past 65 USDT, a 45.87% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: OKX market data shows that DASH has broken through 65 USDT and is currently trading at 65.7 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 45.87%.

data.title: Pakistan Explores Cross-Border Payments with World Liberty's Stablecoin
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, sources indicate that Pakistan has signed an agreement with an affiliate of World Liberty Financial to explore the use of World Liberty's stablecoin for cross-border payments.

World Liberty Financial, a major crypto financial business under the family of U.S. President Donald Trump, was launched in September 2024. This collaboration marks one of the first publicly announced partnerships between World Liberty and a sovereign nation.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Empire of Sight (Sight), with an airdrop threshold of 245 Alpha points.
data.description: According to official news, Binance Alpha will list Empire of Sight (Sight), and Alpha trading will officially begin on January 14, 2026 at 08:00 (UTC). After trading begins, users with at least 245 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 800 Sight tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours; otherwise, they will be considered to have forfeited their claim.

data.title: CARDS shares surged over 43% in 24 hours, pushing its market capitalization above $180 million.
data.description: According to GMGN market data, CARDS, the token of Collector Crypt, a physical trading platform in the Solana ecosystem, surged over 43% in 24 hours, reaching a market capitalization of $180.8 million and a trading volume of $5.2 million.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Progress Toward Web3's Decentralized Vision
data.description:
According to Odaily, Vitalik Buterin recently shared on platform X that the 2014 vision for Web3 aimed to create a permissionless decentralized application ecosystem. Despite being overshadowed by various "meta" and "narrative" elements, the core technology has been strengthening. Ethereum has transitioned to Proof of Stake (PoS) and is scaling, while ZK-EVM and PeerDAS are effectively realizing the "sharding" vision. The data layer protocol Whisper has evolved into Waku, supporting applications like Status, and IPFS is excelling in decentralized file retrieval.

Buterin believes that all prerequisites for Web3's original vision are now in place, signaling the time for decentralized development. He cited Fileverse as an exemplary application, utilizing Ethereum and Gnosis Chain for handling names and accounts. He concluded by stating that a decentralized renaissance is imminent.

data.title: Upbit will list USDE (Korean Won), Bitcoin, and USDT trading pairs.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Upbit will launch trading pairs for USDE (Korean Won), Bitcoin, and USDT.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 95,000 USDT with a 3.03% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 14, 2026, 06:56 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 95,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 95,003.796875 USDT, with a narrowed 3.03% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: IP topped Upbit in 24-hour spot trading volume and ranked sixth globally in derivatives trading volume.
data.description: According to CoinGecko data, the IP/KRW trading pair led the Korean won trading market for the second consecutive day with a 15.45% share of trading volume, reaching $308 million in 24 hours. Following closely were XRP ($12.97%, $259 million) and BTC ($10.41%, $207 million). Furthermore, according to Coinglass data, IP ranked sixth globally in 24-hour derivatives trading volume, with a total trading value of $2.865 billion, second only to DOGE's $3.916 billion. IP is currently trading at $4.038, with a maximum 24-hour increase of 40%, having touched $4.198 earlier today, a nearly 60-day high.

data.title: Japanese Stock Market Reaches Record High Amid Election Speculation
data.description: According to Odaily, speculation about a potential early election in Japan has led to continued gains in the Japanese stock market, marking a second consecutive day of record highs. The Nikkei 225 index closed up 1.48% at 54,341.23 points, surpassing the 54,000-point mark for the first time. Meanwhile, the yen and bonds continued to decline, with the USD/JPY exchange rate hovering above the 159 level, currently up by 0.14%.

data.title: Pakistan Partners with WLF to Integrate USD1 Stablecoin into Digital Payment System
data.description: According to Foresight News, sources indicate that Pakistan has entered into an agreement with an affiliate of World Liberty Financial (WLF). Under this agreement, WLF will collaborate with Pakistan's central bank to integrate its USD1 stablecoin into the country's regulated digital payment system. This integration aims to enable the stablecoin to operate alongside Pakistan's own digital currency infrastructure for cross-border payments.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Reflects on Blockchain Vision and Future Prospects
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin recently shared his reflections on the blockchain vision from 2014 via social media. At that time, the concept was to create permissionless decentralized applications capable of supporting functions such as finance, social media, ride-sharing, organizational governance, and crowdfunding, potentially establishing a completely alternative network built on a unified set of technologies. Over the past five years, this core vision has occasionally become unclear, with various 'meta-narratives' and 'themes' taking precedence. However, the core vision has never disappeared. In fact, the foundational technology supporting this vision is becoming increasingly robust.

Buterin noted that in 2014, decentralized applications were merely experimental and were significantly more challenging to use during the Web 2.0 era compared to now. By 2026, tools like Fileverse have become sufficiently user-friendly, allowing him to frequently use them for document creation and collaboration. A decentralized renaissance is on the horizon, and individuals have the opportunity to be part of this transformation.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer from DBS Bank to Cold Wallet
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 14:28, 3,000 ETH were transferred from DBS Bank to its cold wallet.
